title: Synth-D patch file
description: Canonical contract for an exported Synth-D patch file. REFERENCE DOCUMENTATION ONLY — this document is not loaded or executed at runtime; import validation is hand-rolled in src/patches/file.js (no runtime schema dependency). A test (file.schema.test.js) validates shared fixtures against both this document and the hand-rolled validator and asserts they agree, so the two cannot silently drift. The structural gate checks number-ness of parameter values only; integer-domain coercion of switch parameters happens after validation and is intentionally NOT expressed here.

fileFormat.description: File-format contract version. Independent of the patch envelope's own `version`. Only version 1 is recognized; any other value (including a higher, future version) is rejected because there is no migration logic yet.

name.description: The patch name. Must be a string. An empty or whitespace-only string passes the structural gate but is rejected during name normalization.

version.description: The patch envelope's schema version (constant, not a per-save counter). Optional in the file; a missing or non-numeric value is replaced with the current patch version on import.

params.description: Map of parameter name to value. Every value must be a number. An empty object is valid and yields a factory-defaults patch. Unknown and out-of-range values are dropped or coerced after this structural check, not rejected here.
